title: Fallen Log Hideout
description: Adds a fallen log hideout to forest biomes
body:
### Fallen Log Hideout:

**This mod adds a fallen log structure to forest biomes. The log features a hidden entrance.**

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d00c13e78b7fad51a2763d3f03a00182725f5bb7.jpeg)

Inside, you'll find a fully decorated interior with villagers living inside.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aa63c91f64e065b60de8a8a416f0684c754a76a.jpeg)

There are also some chests with loot and hidden secrets waiting to be discovered.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61a70c1e7825dfe599dd5aa2d2a1e5f841606458.jpeg)

The log mostly spawns in Dark Forest and Taiga biomes.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
